name: Julia Child's Eggplant and Cheese Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons minced shallots, or green part of scallions
1/3 cup grated Parmesan and Swiss cheese combined
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel eggplant and cut into 3/4 inch dice.
2. In a bowl, toss eggplant with salt and let stand for 20 to 30 minutes.
3. Drain and pat dry with a towel.
4. Heat 1/8 inch layer of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. When very hot but not smoking, add the eggplant and toss frequently for 4-8 minutes until tender and lightly browned.
6. Add shallots or scallions and garlic, shaking pan over heat for about a minute to cook them.
7. Turn the eggplant mixture into a large sieve set over a bowl to drain off excess oil.
8. Mix the eggplant with parsley, herbs, and half the cheese in a separate bowl.
9. Pour this mixture into the partially baked pastry shell.
10. In a small bowl, beat together eggs, pepper, nutmeg, and cream. Add salt if the cooked eggplant doesn't already have enough.
11. Pour this mixture over the eggplant in the pastry shell.
12. Sprinkle with remaining cheese and dot with butter.
13. Bake in a preheated 375-degree oven for about 30 minutes or until puffed and brown.
